confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_47d8a086-defb-4a41-8c4f-d282cd889433 read back as archived

evidence: task evidence inspect 40 --cwd /mnt/c/Users/Andrey/Narada returned task_id 20260415-040-generalize-outbound-into-intent-log from Narada proper
task evidence inspect --cwd /mnt/c/Users/Andrey/Narada 40 was the required shape
proposal: Make --cwd position-invariant where possible, or reject commands when --cwd appears after a positional argument and would be ignored/misapplied.
payload.recommendation: Treat as CAPA because cross-Site authority confusion can lead to wrong repairs or conclusions.
payload.summary: While diagnosing task 40, I ran task evidence inspect 40 with --cwd after the positional argument. The command returned evidence for Narada proper task 40 instead of the intended narada-andrey User Site task 40. Placing --cwd before the task number returned the intended behavior. This is a dangerous footgun because the output looked valid but belonged to another Site.
payload.title: Task commands can silently inspect the wrong Site when --cwd is misplaced

promotion.note: Envelope archived; no target-zone mutation was performed.
